description: Small-doc sweep: (1) SKILL.md 'task file deleted from HEAD' clarify it's the state branch's HEAD not main; (2) bl resolve <FILE> CLI help is bare — add a one-line description or hide from top-level help since the new schema rarely needs it; (3) bl show help doesn't mention the delivered: line — add a note to the CLI help string; (4) README 'Why Not Existing Alternatives -> Beads' section needs a rewrite to acknowledge we moved to an orphan ref ourselves and reframe the criticism around 'one VCS vs two' instead of 'optimizes a non-problem'. Keep it respectful.
title: Doc polish: SKILL.md, bl resolve help, bl show delivery line, beads rewrite
